# @pondoknusa/broadcasting-websocket

Native WebSocket broadcast driver and hub for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/broadcasting-websocket
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/broadcasting-websocket`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/broadcasting-websocket) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@pondoknusa/broadcasting](/reference/generated/packages/broadcasting)

## Public exports

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.

- `WebSocketBroadcastServiceProvider`
- `WebSocketBroadcaster`
- `WebSocketHub`
- `getWebSocketHub`
- `registerWebSocketBroadcastDriver`
